title: Cambodia's parliament passes law targeting online crypto scam compounds
message_html: Cambodia's parliament passes law targeting online crypto scam compounds ...
snippet: The Law on Anti-Technology Fraud introduces five new offenses aimed at rooting out modern online scams and crimes.
